news.title: Chutes & Ladders—Former FDA leader takes new biotech Turn

news.title: Betting on biotech: Prediction markets set sights on clinical trials
news.snippet: Several biotech contracts are rotating through Kalshi and Polymarket, while a prediction market specifically focused on clinical trials has recently launched.

news.title: Lilly’s triple-G drug helps patients lose roughly a quarter of weight, showcasing competitive profile

news.title: Struggling Liminatus pays $320M in stock for CAR-T biotech InnocsAI
news.snippet: Cancer immunotherapy company Liminatus Pharma has agreed to pay out shares worth $320 million to buy CAR-T biotech InnocsAI.

news.title: Infex, following in Insmed’s footsteps, advances lung disease candidate after clearing phase 2a

news.title: US taps small San Diego biotech for experimental Ebola treatment as epidemic worsens

news.title: Medtronic inks $650M deal for SPR Therapeutics

news.title: GHO Capital, CBC Group plan to merge, forming $21B healthcare investment firm
news.snippet: London-based Global Healthcare Opportunities and Singapore-based CBC Group announced plans to merge, creating what they called the largest healthcare-focused investment manager, with over $21 billion

news.title: Qiagen links with chip giant Nvidia to propel AI use in drug discovery
news.snippet: Qiagen, a Netherlands-based diagnostics maker, is linking with tech giant Nvidia in a collaboration aimed at boosting the ability of researchers to leverage AI in the drug discovery process.

news.title: Lilly pens $202M deal for preclinical DNA delivery biotech Engage as M&A streak continues
news.snippet: San Carlos-based Engage is developing non-viral DNA delivery systems that aim to overcome traditional limitations associated with the modality.

news.title: With $30M launch, Oorja Bio breathes new life into South Korean fibrosis candidate

news.title: Incyte pays Genesis $80M to expand AI-fueled drug discovery pact

news.title: BMS taps Anthropic’s Claude for enterprise-wide AI adoption to speed R&D, global workflows

news.title: Labcorp joins lab results personalization push with ‘MyLabcorp’ AI app
news.snippet: The big new thing in medtech for 2026 is AI-powered apps and chatbots designed to help patients navigate their laboratory test results. Now, testing giant Labcorp is getting in on the act.

news.title: Lilly accuses church-linked pharmacies, wholesalers and more of running $200M+ rebate fraud scheme

news.title: Inside agency view: Ogilvy Health on AI’s ‘light speed,’ nano influencers and the rise of Ria
news.snippet: Healthcare agencies remain at the forefront of pharmaceutical marketing, but new technologies and shifting political dynamics are putting increasing pressure on the industry.

news.title: Amgen's Tavneos, facing liver injury scrutiny, gets label update in Japan as patient starts resume
news.snippet: After the drug’s local license holder called for a brief pause in new patient starts last week, doctors in Japan can once again prescribe Amgen’s rare autoimmune disease med Tavneos (avacopan), albeit

news.title: Gilead pledges 400K AmBisome doses to fight visceral leishmaniasis in expanded WHO collab
news.snippet: Gilead’s five-year contract with the WHO is centered on providing AmBisome to countries that make up 74% of the global visceral leishmaniasis burden, according to the company.

news.title: With Voxzogo under pressure, BioMarin touts trial win in label expansion bid
news.snippet: With phase 3 results that have “exceeded” BioMarin’s expectations, the California biotech looks set up to gain a label expansion for its top-selling product, dwarfism drug Voxzogo.

news.title: Lilly, AbbVie, J&J, AZ lead an uptick in Big Pharma Q1 growth, with Novo again bringing up the rear
news.snippet: Biopharma sales trended upward in the first quarter of this year as eight of the industry’s top-25 companies achieved double-digit year-over-year growth. It was an uptick from 2025 when there were six

news.title: Ipsen details growing pains as teens transition to adult care
news.snippet: An Ipsen-commissioned survey has identified widespread problems with the transition from pediatric to adult healthcare, prompting the drugmaker to call for more resources to help people manage the shi

news.title: Regulatory tracker: MaaT Pharma will ask Europe for re-examination of graft-versus-host disease med

news.title: Amgen, bidding adieu to CFO, lures Galderma exec with hefty $12.4M bonus
news.snippet: After some six years at the post, Amgen’s finance chief is telegraphing his exit from the California pharma by early next year.

news.title: Gilead inks another deal with Korean API manufacturer Yuhan, this time worth $140M
news.snippet: Gilead has broadened its partnership with Korean manufacturer Yuhan, agreeing to a $140 million supply deal for active pharmaceutical ingredients for an undisclosed product.

news.title: Tarsus taps John Cena for its latest Demodex blepharitis campaign
news.snippet: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals has spent the past three years marketing its way out of a largely unknown but stigmatized condition: Demodex blepharitis, an eyelid disease caused by mites.

news.title: BeOne kicks off ‘One Save Changes Everything’ campaign with Tim Howard
news.snippet: BeOne Medicines has tapped former professional soccer goalkeeper Tim Howard as the face of its first major corporate campaign, which plays on how the company is geared up to “save” lives.

news.title: CG Life appoints Collette Douaihy as chief creative officer as C-suite buildout continues
news.snippet: CG Life has hired Collette “Coco” Douaihy, bringing the former Dentsu International, Evoke and Digitas Health leader on board to head up its creative offering to biopharma companies.

news.title: STAT+: Closely watched experimental Parkinson’s drug fails key clinical trial
news.snippet: Biogen and Denali Therapeutics said a closely watched experimental therapy for Parkinson’s disease failed to slow the degenerative brain disorder in a randomized trial.

news.title: STAT+: Merck-Kelun lung cancer drug cut risk of tumor progression by 65%, ASCO abstract shows
news.snippet: A type of targeted chemotherapy developed by China-based Kelun-Biotech and licensed to Merck cut the risk of tumor progression by 65% in patients with lung cancer, according to Phase 3…

news.title: Guarding biotech from China and big bets in longevity

news.title: STAT+: Immunovant shares surge on arthritis trial data
news.snippet: Trial results for Lilly's "triple-G" drug, FDA's leadership purge leaves chaos, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Lilly obesity drug trial, statistics for an Alzheimer’s drug, and more
news.snippet: Eli Lilly reported that in a late-stage trial, its next-generation obesity drug led to weight loss approaching the effectiveness seen with bariatric surgery

news.title: STAT+: Lilly’s ‘triple-G’ drug leads to bariatric-surgery levels of weight loss in trial
news.snippet: A next-gen Eli Lilly obesity drug led to bariatric-surgery levels of weight loss in a study, but also saw patients dropping out because of side effects.

news.title: STAT+: After warning letter, Whoop and FDA in discussions about controversial blood pressure feature
news.snippet: Whoop is yet to resolve a dispute with the FDA over a blood pressure feature, a top executive said at STAT's Breakthrough Summit.

news.title: Opinion: STAT+: Dark times ahead at the FDA
news.snippet: It almost feels like the Trump administration is intentionally breaking the FDA, writes Lab Dish columnist Paul Knoepfler.

news.title: Riskiest skin cancer cases hit UK record high
news.snippet: The number of melanoma skin cancer cases has risen above 20,000 a year for the first time in the UK.

news.title: MPs call for sunbed advertising ban to help prevent skin cancer
news.snippet: A report by a cross-party group of MPs has found the majority of skin cancer cases are preventable.

news.title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
news.snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.
